results.rendered_html:
nisṛj 6 P.
1 To set free, release; na svāminā nisṛṣṭo'pi śūdro dāsyādbimucyate  Ms. 8. 414. 
2 To deliver over, consign, entrust.
3 To give away, offer, present. See nimṛṣṭa.
